sections.deviceNameDescription: This name is shown on mobile devices
sections.connectionCodeDescription: After regeneration, old phones need to pair again
sections.shareAddressDescription: Checks this computer's SMB sharing status for mobile access to the shared folder
sections.bonjourDescription: Allows phones on the same LAN to discover this computer

deviceName.lockedHint: Files are being received. Rename after transfer finishes.

connectionCode.regenerateConfirm: Changing the pairing code will invalidate all currently paired phones. They will need to pair again with the new code. Continue?

connectionDevices.title: Connected devices
connectionDevices.description: Manage authorized phones, blocked pairing requests, and recent pairing code attempts.
connectionDevices.confirmRevoke: After revoking, this phone must enter the desktop pairing code again next time. Revoke authorization?
connectionDevices.confirmClearBlock: Clearing the block will not authorize the phone automatically. The phone still needs the correct pairing code. Clear block?

powerSave.preventSleepDescription: Keep computer awake while Lynavo Drive is running (screen is allowed to turn off) so mobile can sync at any time. This does not enable Wake-on-LAN, which must be configured separately in macOS or Windows.

shareAddress.label: LAN share address
shareAddress.readyDetail: {{shareName}} is accessible to devices on the same LAN.
shareAddress.needsManualEnableDetailMac: Enable File Sharing in System Settings and allow Lynavo Drive to access the team shared folder.
shareAddress.needsManualEnableDetailWindows: Enable Windows advanced sharing and confirm network discovery is available.
shareAddress.needsManualEnableDetailLinux: Configure file sharing in Linux system settings, then check again.
shareAddress.shareRegisteredDetailMac: System sharing may take a moment to refresh. Keep File Sharing enabled.
shareAddress.shareRegisteredDetailWindows: The team shared folder is registered. Confirm Windows Firewall allows file sharing.
shareAddress.shareRegisteredDetailLinux: The team shared folder is registered. Confirm system file sharing is available.
shareAddress.errorDetail: Check system sharing settings and retry.
shareAddress.unknownDetail: The background service has not reported sharing status yet.
shareAddress.windowsManualHint: Windows must enable advanced sharing before phones can read the team shared folder.
shareAddress.windowsQuickConfigDescription: Open advanced sharing settings and confirm network discovery and file sharing are enabled.

bonjour.defaultMessage: Bonjour allows iPhone to discover this computer automatically.
bonjour.sameLanHint: Confirm the phone and computer are connected to the same LAN.

systemGuide.macSubtitle: Confirm File Sharing and team shared folder permissions are enabled.
systemGuide.windowsDescription: Enable network discovery, file and printer sharing, and sharing for the team shared folder.
systemGuide.linuxDescription: Configure Samba or file sharing in the system, then return to Lynavo Drive and check again.
steps: Confirm the team shared folder is readable by the current user

preventSleep.title: Prevent sleep
preventSleep.caption: Keep the computer awake while transfer jobs are running

receivedAccess.title: Allow paired phones to browse all received files
receivedAccess.captionEnabled: Paired phones can browse and download all received content on this computer
receivedAccess.captionDisabled: Phones can only browse files synced from the same physical device to this computer

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.placeholder: Describe the issue, steps, or improvements you want

diagnostics.caption: Send logs and runtime status to support
diagnostics.description: Upload a diagnostics bundle to help locate transfer, pairing, or sharing issues.
diagnostics.placeholder: Describe the steps, phone model, network environment, or error symptoms (optional)

toasts.preventSleepEnabled: Computer will stay awake during transfers
toasts.receivedAccessFailed: Failed to update received file browsing access
toasts.diagnosticsUploaded: Diagnostics bundle uploaded. Thanks for your feedback.

community.title: Local LAN access
community.caption: Pair, discover, and sync automatically on the same LAN. No Lynavo cloud login is required.
community.devicesCaption: Phones continue to use local pairing tokens and paired-device authorization for LAN access.

support.title: Support and diagnostics
support.description: Upload a diagnostics bundle to support. Local export is only used when the network is unavailable.
support.diagnosticsDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the steps, phone model, network environment, or error symptoms
support.diagnosticsDescriptionHelp: The description is uploaded with the diagnostics bundle for troubleshooting.
support.sameLanHint: Confirm the phone and computer are connected to the same LAN.
support.minimumRequired: This version must be updated before continuing.
